top_signals.title: Meta jumps into AI coding market in effort to chase Anthropic and OpenAI
top_signals.summary: Meta is upgrading its Muse Spark artificial intelligence model under the leadership of AI chief Alexandr Wang.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wall Street’s boutiques bet on star bankers. Now they’re stuck with the bill
top_signals.summary: Investment banks such as Evercore, Lazard and Moelis scooped up dealmakers ahead of an upswing that has yet to fully materialise
